login.title: Log in
login.description: Pick up where you left off with your transactions and assets.
login.developmentSubmit: Log in as the development user
login.developmentDescription: Use the existing local database without entering a password.

guest.headline: Turn money movement into a record you can trust.
guest.description: Banks, cards, e-money, points, and investments. Connect scattered histories in one place and keep every balance explainable.
guest.footer: A safety-first workflow that lets you review imported data before applying it.

welcome.description: Connect daily transactions, account balances, and investment valuations. Review and classify imported records, then understand how and why your assets changed.

preview.title: Monthly Report
preview.chartLabel: Sample chart showing a gradual increase in net assets

unify.title: Connect every record
unify.description: Manage banks, cards, e-money, points, and investments as accounts, with activity and balances visible in one place.

classify.title: Resolve the ambiguity
classify.description: Review classification suggestions and turn them into rules. Separate transfers from real spending and prevent double counting.

trace.title: Trace what changed
trace.description: Use monthly reports and daily asset history to understand each change, then follow it back to the underlying records.

welcome.footer: NKKakeist — Personal finance with an audit trail.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your registered email address and we will send you a password reset link.

confirmPassword.title: Confirm your password
confirmPassword.description: This is a protected action. Enter your password before continuing.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email address
verifyEmail.description: Thanks for registering. Open the link in the email we sent to verify your email address. If it did not arrive, you can request another email.
verifyEmail.sent: A new verification link has been sent to the email address you used during registration.
